creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #5)
Taking a closer look, I'm quite convinced that the problem is fixed.  iflib_device_register() would have called ether_ifattach() with the ctx lock held, and the stack is virtually the same as that reported in PR 271768, it's just a different driver.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 271768 ***
